items.title: Premier Inn owner Whitbread to cut up to 3,800 jobs
items.desc: Whitbread said today it will shut its 197 remaining branded restaurants and start selling more meals at its Premier Inn hotels, potentially cutting about 3,800 jobs as it battles pressure from UK property taxes and an activist investor.

items.title: Punjab Police bust ISI spy ring operating with the help of solar-powered CCTV cameras
items.desc: The Punjab Police said an arrested suspect and his associates installed these devices near sensitive military-linked sites to beam live footage straight to Pakistan-based handlers via mobile apps.

items.title: Domestic footfalls lighting up India's hotels
items.desc: India's hotel industry is evolving, emphasizing on domestic travel and local demand. Investment is growing, particularly in Bengaluru and Mumbai, with an increased shift towards smaller cities, shows a new report by HVS Anarock.

items.title: Neo-Nazi is found guilty of planning mass gun attack after being snared by undercover MI5 sting
items.desc: Neo-Nazi Alfie Coleman, 21, has been found guilty at the Old Bailey of planning a mass gun attack after being snared by MI5 in an undercover sting.

items.desc: Jane Pilborough, 62, was the only staff member to try to stop the young thief's attempts to smuggle 'chicken bites' out of the Newark store in his pockets.
